updateNote: Day 78 PM: Iran announces Persian Gulf Strait Authority (PGSA) — formal Hormuz toll mechanism, excludes US 'Project Freedom' ships. Trump sends written nuclear proposal; Araghchi denies receiving it. Shamkhani: ready to sign if all sanctions removed, but US demands 'a fantasy.' Pakistan FM Naqvi in Tehran for 2-day mediation push. Israel: 49 killed total; Lebanon: 2,882 killed (Wikipedia May 12). Brent $109.26 (+8.1%/wk), WTI $105.42 (+11%/wk). Gas $4.52. Hormuz Day 76.
